message.content:
@startuml
title Initialization

box "service process" #lightblue
participant "ConcreteImpl" as CI #moccasin
participant "DBusAdapter" as DBA #lightgreen
end box

participant "DBus" as DB #lightgrey

box "client process" #lavender
participant "DBusProxy" as DBP #lightgreen
end box

DBA -> DBA : Init(ConcreteImpl)
DBA -> DB : Export

DBP -> DBP : Init
note right of DBP : Tries to fetch all properties\nincluding "ready" property

DBP -> DB : ConnectToRemoteObject
DBP -> DB : GetAllProperties
DB -> DBA : GetAllProperties
DBA --> DB : return properties
DB --> DBP : return properties

@enduml
